name: Chocolate Chocolate Chip Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C) and prepare the muffin pan by greasing it or lining with paper liners.
2. In a large bowl, combine eggs, oil, milk, and vanilla; mix well.
3. In a smaller bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, cocoa, baking powder, salt, and chocolate chips.
4. Gradually add the dry mixture to the wet mixture, folding gently until just combined.
5. Spoon batter into prepared muffin cups.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from pan and cool on a wire rack.
